variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16656 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16656 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16656 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 361.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 352.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 230.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 634.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 620.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 95.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson X770688 Air Filter Kit | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16656
variants.option1Value: Donaldson X770688 Air Filter Kit | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16656
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson X770688 Air Filter Kit includes all necessary components for efficient air filtration, ensuring clean airflow to the engine. It provides reliable protection against airborne contaminants. Suitable for a range of applications, this air filter kit enhances engine performance and extends service intervals.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4272 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16656
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4272 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16656
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4272 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
